name: Jetson-PI: Towards Onboard Real-Time Robot Control via Foresight-Aligned Asynchronous Inference

description: arXiv:2607.12659v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have achieved impressive performance on diverse embodied tasks. However, deploying VLA models on low-power onboard devices, such as the Jetson Orin, remains challenging due to their high computational complexity, which leads to substantial inference latency and low control frequency. Asynchronous infer...
author: Zebin Yang, Qi Wang, Yunhe Wang, Xiurui Guo, Bo Yu, Shaoshan Liu, Jiafeng Xu, Hao Dong, Meng Li
